text:
omake-pfadlib is the 16th and final track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

In Japanese, "omake" (おまけ) refers to bonus material. "pfadlib" is an abbreviation of "pianoforte ad libitum," musical terms meaning "piano improvisation."

All occurrences

Episode 6 - Eren gives Mikasa the scarf
Episode 7 - Opening narration
Episode 22 - The Scouts return defeated
Episode 44 - Eren confesses his remorse to Historia
